title: Templates & downloads
summary: Here you can find and download some of our more common templates. More will be added in a near future.

columns.text: Here you can find and download some of our more common templates. More will be added in a near future.
Here you can download technical specifications for our stationery templates.
Here you can download our most common product sheets in three variations.
The signature should as the correspondence- and business cards show a unified expression. Email signatures shall either be in local language or in English. The disclaimer text should be in English.

CONFIDENTIALITY NOTICEThis e-mail is confidential and may contain legally privileged information. If you have received it by mistake, please inform us by reply e-mail and then delete it (including any attachments) from your system; you should not copy it or in any other way disclose its content to anyone. E-mail is susceptible to data corruption, interception, unauthorized amendment, tampering and virus. We do not accept liability for any such actions or the consequences thereof.
